说一下，这两部剧不是 AI 啊，我只是让大家可以参考一下这个质量，都是实拍。
Based on your own tests what model do you think is better?

Your “AI browser” is probably snitching on you.

Neo flips the model:

AI inside.
VPN inside.
Fingerprinting blocked.
Phishing stopped before the click.
No extension circus.
No privacy scavenger hunt.

A browser that doesn’t make safety feel like DLC.

AI already turned everyone into a writer, designer, editor, and coder.

Now it’s coming for games.

And most people are sleeping through it like this isn’t the next creator gold rush.

Meet @playastrocade. https://t.co/LASeEyBF0N

Astrocade is the TikTok of games:

UGC games built for the scroll era.

Not massive downloads.
Not hardcore dev tools.
Not “learn coding for 6 months.”

Just create, play, share, repeat.

This is the part people miss:

The next wave of viral creators won’t just post content.

They’ll build tiny addictive worlds people can actually interact with.

Memes were phase one.
Playable memes are phase two.

Astrocade just raised $56M led by Sequoia.

They also announced a $10M Creator Fund to pay creators whose games take off.

That’s not a random gaming app.

That’s infrastructure for a new creator category

The people who ignored TikTok early called it cringe.

Then watched teenagers build media empires from their bedrooms.

Same energy here.

Except now the content is playable.

要问 GEO 做的最好的公司，感觉还是 zapier 、 hubspot 、 perplexity 、 replit 、 elevenlabs 。

这几个东西，在中国没啥人用，

但是你一旦用 海外的大模型，每当提到 AI 杀手级应用，动不动就推荐这几家。

不知道是不是交广告费比较多（ 插入到训练语料里，去污染大模型 ）。

挺扯的 ...

2026 年 5 月 5 日 8:00 – 5 月 8 日 12:00

1. 前往应用商店下载 TRAE APP
2. 点击右上角“免费领咖啡”
3. 给 SOLO 下达一次工作指令

即可领取美式咖啡兑换券 1 张。

*数量有限，领完即止。活动详情和活动规则，请至TRAE APP相关活动页面查询。

这家由前工程师梁文峰创立、并获得对冲基金“高飞资本”（High-Flyer Capital）支持的中国人工智能初创企业，目前正与国家支持的“大基金”及腾讯公司进行洽谈，以筹集其首轮融资。

该公司凭借其于2025年1月发布的R1模型而声名鹊起——该模型在训练过程中所耗费的算力远低于其美国竞争对手——受此推动
